description: Style Notefootfun shoes for your little one are designed for maximum comfort and are hard wearing (you know the scrapes your little one can get into!) They're fashioned to make your child look as cute-as-a-button!Product DetailsSlip-on shoe with shiny red synthetic upper with cool printHas elasticated gussets on either sides of the tongue for a snug FitBranding on the midfootPadded tongue and collarTPU outsole with pointed and circular lugs all overMaterial and careSyntheticWipe with a cotton swab to remove dust
